theme_and_archetype.rationale: The problem statement explicitly requests a 'bold dark theme with electric/neon accents' while also demanding a 'premium high-trust visual that converts B2B leads'. By blending the electric cyan/green accents of Archetype 7 with the void blacks, grain textures, and cinematic typography of Archetype 5, we achieve an authoritative yet highly modern Web3/AI agency vibe without looking like a generic gaming site.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF66] text-[#050505] hover:bg-[#00CC52] font-semibold transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,102,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,255,102,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/15 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300

cards.tracing_beam: For premium services, add a subtle gradient border that changes on hover.

chatbot_widget.style: bg-[#00FF66] text-black w-14 h-14 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,102,0.4)] flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer hover:scale-105 transition-transform

header.style: fixed w-full top-0 z-40 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

motion.micro_interactions: Subtle scale-up (scale-105) on interactive elements. Links should have an underline expansion or color shift on hover.
motion.scroll_animations: Fade in and translate up (translate-y-8 to 0) using framer-motion stagger logic for bento grid children.
motion.hero_animations: Text should reveal line by line. Staggered fade-ins for CTA buttons.

hero_background.description: Abstract neon tunnel. Use as hero background with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-black/70 or a gradient from top to bottom) so text is 100% readable.

agency_presence.description: Modern office skyscraper at night with glowing lights. Use for the 'Why Us' or 'About the Agency' section.

testimonials.description: Confident businessman. Use as testimonial avatar.
Man with beard and glasses. Use as testimonial avatar.
Formal portrait young man. Use as testimonial avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs). Use kebab-case.

Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards for the Bento Grid. Build custom HTML/Tailwind containers (`<div className="bg-[#0A0A0A] rounded-2xl p-8 border border-white/5">`) to maintain exact control over borders, hover states, and spacing.
For the AI Agent Services Grid, use a Bento Grid layout. E.g., md:col-span-2 or row-span-2 for featured agents, standard cells for others.
For the FOMO banner, place a fixed or sticky thin banner at the top of the page under the nav (or above it) with urgent text (e.g., 'Limited onboarding slots for this month - Book Now').
Use `lucide-react` for icons within the services cards. Make them large and wrap them in a glowing circle or subtle gradient box.
Ensure contrast is accessible. The primary text should be `#F3F4F6`, never completely `#FFFFFF`.
Add a subtle grain overlay across the entire site by utilizing a fixed div with pointer-events-none and a noise texture background or SVG filter.
Build a separate Admin dashboard layout for Leads & Appointments. It should use Shadcn Tables, but inherit the dark theme and neon green primary accents.
